历史记录

模拟炒股网站应用设计方案
新对话

Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 正式上线Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 正式上线： MiMo-V2.5-Pro 长程推理与 Agent 大幅增强； MiMo-V2.5 全模态 1M 上下文； MiMo-V2.5-TTS 系列 音色克隆与精细控制全面升级

MiMo-V2.5-ProNew

模拟股市炒股，假定你持有人民币5000元，从2026年4月10日到5月29日这段时间内，你可以买入卖出多支股票，5月30日开始计算收益，包括现金和持有的股市股票价格一起的总价值以及全部的买卖股票交易细节。各个股市的股票涨降详细图表，直观美观，股票为实时记录,创建网站应用
MiMo-V2.5-Pro

模拟炒股网站应用设计方案

基于您的需求，我将为您设计一个功能完整、界面美观的模拟炒股网站应用。该系统将允许用户使用5000元虚拟资金，在指定时间段内进行股票买卖操作，最终计算投资收益并展示详细的交易记录和股价走势图表2。

一、系统总体架构

1.1 技术栈选择

为满足实时交易和数据可视化的需求，建议采用以下技术架构：

  • 后端框架：SpringBoot + MyBatis-Plus，提供稳定的RESTful API和WebSocket支持45
  • 前端框架：Vue3 + Vite + Element Plus，构建响应式用户界面25
  • 实时通信：WebSocket用于股票行情实时推送，确保数据延迟低于100ms6
  • 图表库：ECharts用于渲染K线图、收益曲线等金融图表4
  • 数据库：MySQL 5.7/8.0，存储用户信息、交易记录和持仓数据45
  • 缓存层：Redis用于存储实时行情数据和会话信息，提高系统性能

1.2 系统功能结构

整个系统包含以下核心模块4：

  1. 1.用户管理模块：注册、登录、个人信息管理
  2. 2.行情中心模块：股票列表、实时行情、K线图展示
  3. 3.交易执行模块：买入、卖出、撤单、持仓查询
  4. 4.资产清算模块：资金流水、收益计算、报表生成
  5. 5.数据可视化模块：交易记录图表、收益曲线、投资分析

二、核心功能设计与实现

2.1 用户认证与账户初始化

系统采用JWT进行用户认证，新用户注册后自动初始化虚拟资金账户5。

java
java
// 用户注册与账户初始化
@PostMapping("/api/user/register")
public Result register(@RequestBody UserRegisterDTO dto) {
    // 1. 创建用户记录
    User user = new User();
    user.setUsername(dto.getUsername());
    user.setPassword(passwordEncoder.encode(dto.getPassword()));
    userRepository.save(user);

    // 2. 初始化资金账户（初始资金5000元）
    Account account = new Account();
    account.setUserId(user.getId());
    account.setBalance(5000.00);
    account.setTotalAsset(5000.00);
    accountRepository.save(account);

    return Result.success("注册成功");
}

2.2 实时行情获取与展示

集成免费股票行情接口获取实时数据，并通过WebSocket推送给前端67。

javascript
javascript
// 前端WebSocket连接行情服务
const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8080/ws/stock');
ws.onmessage = function(event) {
    const stockData = JSON.parse(event.data);
    updateStockPrice(stockData.code, stockData.price, stockData.change);
    updateKLineChart(stockData); // 更新K线图
};

行情数据模型设计：

sql
sql
CREATE TABLE stock_realtime (
    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    stock_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '股票代码',
    stock_name VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '股票名称',
    current_price DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '当前价格',
    open_price DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '开盘价',
    high_price DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '最高价',
    low_price DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '最低价',
    volume BIGINT COMMENT '成交量',
    change_percent DECIMAL(5,2) COMMENT '涨跌幅',
    update_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_stock_code (stock_code)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

2.3 交易撮合引擎

实现价格优先、时间优先的撮合算法，支持限价单和市价单4。

java
java
// 订单撮合核心逻辑
public TradeResult matchOrder(Order order) {
    if (order.getType() == OrderType.LIMIT) {
        // 限价单：只有当市场价格达到指定价格时才成交
        if (order.getDirection() == Direction.BUY) {
            // 买单：当卖一价 <= 指定价格时撮合
            return matchLimitBuyOrder(order);
        } else {
            // 卖单：当买一价 >= 指定价格时撮合
            return matchLimitSellOrder(order);
        }
    } else {
        // 市价单：立即以当前市场价成交
        return matchMarketOrder(order);
    }
}

交易规则配置：

java
java
@Configuration
public class TradeConfig {
    // 交易规则配置(citation:4)
    @Value("${trade.rule.t-plus-1}")
    private boolean tPlus1 = true; // T+1交割制度

    @Value("${trade.rule.price-limit}")
    private double priceLimit = 0.10; // 涨跌停限制10%

    @Value("${trade.rule.min-price-unit}")
    private double minPriceUnit = 0.01; // 最小价格变动单位
}

2.4 资产清算与收益计算

在2026年5月30日自动计算用户总资产和收益4。

java
java
// 收益计算服务
@Service
public class ProfitCalculationService {

    /**
     * 计算用户在指定日期的总资产
     * @param userId 用户ID
     * @param date   计算日期（2026-05-30）
     * @return 总资产详情
     */
    public AssetDetail calculateTotalAsset(Long userId, LocalDate date) {
        // 1. 查询现金余额
        Account account = accountRepository.findByUserId(userId);
        double cashBalance = account.getBalance();

        // 2. 查询持仓股票
        List<Holding> holdings = holdingRepository.findByUserId(userId);

        // 3. 计算持仓股票市值（使用指定日期的收盘价）
        double holdingValue = 0.0;
        for (Holding holding : holdings) {
            StockPrice price = stockPriceRepository
                .findByStockCodeAndDate(holding.getStockCode(), date);
            if (price != null) {
                holdingValue += holding.getQuantity() * price.getClosePrice();
            }
        }

        // 4. 计算总资产和收益率
        double totalAsset = cashBalance + holdingValue;
        double initialAsset = 5000.00; // 初始资金
        double profitRate = ((totalAsset - initialAsset) / initialAsset) * 100;

        return new AssetDetail(
            userId, date, cashBalance, holdingValue,
            totalAsset, profitRate, profitRate > 0 ? "盈利" : "亏损"
        );
    }
}

三、数据库设计

3.1 核心数据表结构

基于模拟交易需求，设计以下主要数据表34：

sql
sql
-- 用户表
CREATE TABLE `user` (
    `id` BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `username` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    `password` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    `email` VARCHAR(100),
    `avatar` VARCHAR(255),
    `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 账户表
CREATE TABLE `account` (
    `id` BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `balance` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 5000.00 COMMENT '现金余额',
    `frozen_amount` DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '冻结金额',
    `total_asset` DECIMAL(15,2) COMMENT '总资产',
    `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user`(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 持仓表
CREATE TABLE `holding` (
    `id` BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `stock_code` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    `stock_name` VARCHAR(50),
    `quantity` INT NOT NULL COMMENT '持仓数量',
    `avg_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '持仓成本价',
    `current_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '当前价格',
    `market_value` DECIMAL(15,2) COMMENT '持仓市值',
    `profit_loss` DECIMAL(15,2) COMMENT '浮动盈亏',
    `profit_rate` DECIMAL(5,2) COMMENT '盈亏比例',
    `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY `uk_user_stock` (`user_id`, `stock_code`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user`(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 交易记录表
CREATE TABLE `trade_record` (
    `id` BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `stock_code` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    `stock_name` VARCHAR(50),
    `trade_type` ENUM('BUY', 'SELL') NOT NULL COMMENT '交易类型',
    `order_type` ENUM('LIMIT', 'MARKET') COMMENT '订单类型',
    `price` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '成交价格',
    `quantity` INT NOT NULL COMMENT '成交数量',
    `amount` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '成交金额',
    `commission` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '手续费',
    `trade_time` DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '成交时间',
    `order_id` VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '订单编号',
    `status` ENUM('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') DEFAULT 'SUCCESS',
    `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_user_time` (`user_id`, `trade_time`),
    FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user`(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

3.2 股票数据表设计

用于存储股票基础信息和历史行情数据17：

sql
sql
-- 股票基础信息表
CREATE TABLE `stock_info` (
    `stock_code` VARCHAR(10) PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '股票代码',
    `stock_name` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '股票名称',
    `market` VARCHAR(10) COMMENT '所属市场（SH/SZ）',
    `industry` VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '所属行业',
    `list_date` DATE COMMENT '上市日期',
    `total_shares` BIGINT COMMENT '总股本',
    `circulating_shares` BIGINT COMMENT '流通股本',
    `description` TEXT COMMENT '股票简介'
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 股票历史行情表
CREATE TABLE `stock_daily_price` (
    `id` BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `stock_code` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    `trade_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '交易日期',
    `open_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '开盘价',
    `high_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '最高价',
    `low_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '最低价',
    `close_price` DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '收盘价',
    `volume` BIGINT COMMENT '成交量',
    `turnover_rate` DECIMAL(5,2) COMMENT '换手率',
    UNIQUE KEY `uk_code_date` (`stock_code`, `trade_date`),
    INDEX `idx_trade_date` (`trade_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

四、前端界面设计与实现

4.1 用户界面结构

采用清晰的选项卡式布局，包含以下主要页面3：

  1. 1.首页/行情中心：展示股票列表和实时行情
  2. 2.交易页面：执行买入/卖出操作
  3. 3.持仓管理：查看当前持仓和盈亏情况
  4. 4.交易记录：查看历史交易明细
  5. 5.收益分析：查看资产变化和收益曲线
  6. 6.个人中心：管理账户信息和设置

4.2 K线图与数据可视化

使用ECharts实现专业的K线图和收益曲线47：

javascript
javascript
// K线图配置示例
const kLineOption = {
    title: { text: '贵州茅台(600519) 日K线' },
    tooltip: { trigger: 'axis', axisPointer: { type: 'cross' } },
    legend: { data: ['日K', 'MA5', 'MA10', 'MA20'] },
    xAxis: {
        type: 'category',
        data: kLineDates, // 日期数组
        axisLabel: { formatter: function(value) { return value.slice(5); } }
    },
    yAxis: { scale: true },
    series: [
        {
            name: '日K',
            type: 'candlestick',
            data: kLineData, // [开盘, 收盘, 最低, 最高]
            itemStyle: {
                color: '#ef232a', // 上涨颜色（红色）
                color0: '#14b143', // 下跌颜色（绿色）
                borderColor: '#ef232a',
                borderColor0: '#14b143'
            }
        },
        {
            name: 'MA5',
            type: 'line',
            data: calculateMA(5, kLineData),
            smooth: true,
            lineStyle: { opacity: 0.5 }
        }
        // MA10, MA20 等均线
    ]
};

// 收益曲线配置
const profitChartOption = {
    title: { text: '投资收益曲线' },
    tooltip: { trigger: 'axis' },
    xAxis: {
        type: 'category',
        data: tradeDates, // 交易日期数组
        axisLabel: { rotate: 45 }
    },
    yAxis: { name: '总资产（元）' },
    series: [
        {
            name: '总资产',
            type: 'line',
            data: assetValues,
            smooth: true,
            areaStyle: {
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                    { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.8)' },
                    { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.1)' }
                ])
            }
        },
        {
            name: '基准收益（5000元）',
            type: 'line',
            data: new Array(tradeDates.length).fill(5000),
            lineStyle: { type: 'dashed', color: '#999' }
        }
    ]
};

4.3 交易界面设计

提供直观的交易操作界面，包含股票选择、价格输入、数量设置等1：

html
html
<!-- 交易表单组件 -->
<template>
  <div class="trade-panel">
    <div class="stock-selector">
      <el-select v-model="selectedStock" filterable placeholder="选择股票">
        <el-option
          v-for="stock in stockList"
          :key="stock.code"
          :label="`${stock.name} (${stock.code})`"
          :value="stock.code">
        </el-option>
      </el-select>
    </div>

    <div class="trade-type">
      <el-radio-group v-model="tradeType">
        <el-radio-button label="buy">买入</el-radio-button>
        <el-radio-button label="sell">卖出</el-radio-button>
      </el-radio-group>
    </div>

    <div class="order-type">
      <el-radio-group v-model="orderType">
        <el-radio label="limit">限价单</el-radio>
        <el-radio label="market">市价单</el-radio>
      </el-radio-group>
    </div>

    <div class="price-input" v-if="orderType === 'limit'">
      <label>委托价格：</label>
      <el-input-number
        v-model="price"
        :min="0.01"
        :step="0.01"
        :precision="2">
      </el-input-number>
    </div>

    <div class="quantity-input">
      <label>委托数量：</label>
      <el-input-number
        v-model="quantity"
        :min="100"
        :step="100"
        :max="maxQuantity">
      </el-input-number>
      <span class="tip">（最少100股，递增100股）</span>
    </div>

    <div class="trade-summary">
      <p>预计金额：{{ estimatedAmount | currency }}</p>
      <p>可用资金：{{ availableBalance | currency }}</p>
      <p>手续费：{{ commission | currency }}</p>
    </div>

    <el-button
      type="primary"
      @click="submitOrder"
      :loading="submitting">
      {{ tradeType === 'buy' ? '买入' : '卖出' }}
    </el-button>
  </div>
</template>

五、业务逻辑实现

5.1 交易流程实现

完整的买入交易流程如下5：

java
java
// 买入股票服务
@Service
@Transactional
public class TradeService {

    public TradeResult buyStock(Long userId, BuyOrderDTO orderDTO) {
        // 1. 验证用户资金是否充足
        Account account = accountRepository.findByUserId(userId);
        double orderAmount = orderDTO.getPrice() * orderDTO.getQuantity();
        double commission = calculateCommission(orderAmount);
        double totalCost = orderAmount + commission;

        if (account.getBalance() < totalCost) {
            return TradeResult.fail("可用资金不足");
        }

        // 2. 冻结资金
        account.setBalance(account.getBalance() - totalCost);
        account.setFrozenAmount(account.getFrozenAmount() + totalCost);
        accountRepository.save(account);

        // 3. 创建订单
        Order order = new Order();
        order.setUserId(userId);
        order.setStockCode(orderDTO.getStockCode());
        order.setOrderType(orderDTO.getOrderType());
        order.setDirection(Direction.BUY);
        order.setPrice(orderDTO.getPrice());
        order.setQuantity(orderDTO.getQuantity());
        order.setStatus(OrderStatus.PENDING);
        order.setCreateTime(LocalDateTime.now());
        orderRepository.save(order);

        // 4. 提交到撮合引擎
        TradeResult tradeResult = matchingEngine.submitOrder(order);

        if (tradeResult.isSuccess()) {
            // 5. 更新持仓
            updateHolding(userId, orderDTO.getStockCode(),
                         orderDTO.getQuantity(), orderDTO.getPrice());

            // 6. 记录交易
            saveTradeRecord(userId, order, tradeResult);

            return TradeResult.success("买入成功");
        } else {
            // 7. 释放冻结资金
            releaseFrozenAmount(userId, totalCost);
            return tradeResult;
        }
    }

    private double calculateCommission(double amount) {
        // 佣金计算：万分之三，最低5元
        return Math.max(amount * 0.0003, 5.00);
    }
}

5.2 实时行情推送机制

使用WebSocket实现毫秒级行情推送6：

java
java
// WebSocket行情推送服务
@Component
public class StockWebSocketHandler extends TextWebSocketHandler {

    private final Map<String, Set<WebSocketSession>> stockSubscriptions =
        new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    @Override
    public void afterConnectionEstablished(WebSocketSession session) {
        // 连接建立时的处理
    }

    @Override
    protected void handleTextMessage(WebSocketSession session,
                                   TextMessage message) throws Exception {
        // 处理客户端订阅请求
        String payload = message.getPayload();
        JSONObject json = JSONObject.parseObject(payload);

        if ("subscribe".equals(json.getString("type"))) {
            String stockCode = json.getString("stockCode");
            stockSubscriptions.computeIfAbsent(stockCode, k ->
                ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet()).add(session);
        }
    }

    // 定时推送行情数据（每秒一次）
    @Scheduled(fixedRate = 1000)
    public void pushRealtimeData() {
        stockSubscriptions.forEach((stockCode, sessions) -> {
            StockRealtimeData data = realtimeDataService.getStockData(stockCode);
            if (data != null) {
                String message = JSONObject.toJSONString(data);
                TextMessage textMessage = new TextMessage(message);

                sessions.forEach(session -> {
                    try {
                        if (session.isOpen()) {
                            synchronized (session) {
                                session.sendMessage(textMessage);
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        // 处理发送失败
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }
}

六、特色功能实现

6.1 模拟数据生成器

由于时间范围是未来时间，需要生成符合真实市场规律的模拟数据7：

java
java
// 股票价格模拟器
@Service
public class StockPriceSimulator {

    /**
     * 基于几何布朗运动生成模拟股价
     * @param stockCode 股票代码
     * @param days 模拟天数
     * @return 模拟的每日价格序列
     */
    public List<StockPrice> generateSimulatedPrices(String stockCode, int days) {
        List<StockPrice> prices = new ArrayList<>();

        // 初始价格（基于历史数据或随机设定）
        double currentPrice = getInitialPrice(stockCode);

        // 市场参数
        double annualReturn = 0.08; // 年化收益率8%
        double annualVolatility = 0.20; // 年化波动率20%
        double dailyReturn = annualReturn / 252;
        double dailyVolatility = annualVolatility / Math.sqrt(252);

        Random random = new Random();

        for (int i = 0; i < days; i++) {
            // 生成每日涨跌幅（正态分布）
            double dailyChange = dailyReturn + dailyVolatility * random.nextGaussian();

            // 计算当日价格
            currentPrice = currentPrice * (1 + dailyChange);

            // 添加涨跌停限制（±10%）
            double previousClose = i == 0 ? currentPrice : prices.get(i-1).getClosePrice();
            double limitUp = previousClose * 1.10;
            double limitDown = previousClose * 0.90;

            currentPrice = Math.max(limitDown, Math.min(limitUp, currentPrice));

            // 生成OHLC数据
            double openPrice = currentPrice * (0.98 + random.nextDouble() * 0.04);
            double highPrice = currentPrice * (1 + random.nextDouble() * 0.02);
            double lowPrice = currentPrice * (1 - random.nextDouble() * 0.02);
            long volume = (long)(1000000 + random.nextDouble() * 5000000);

            StockPrice price = new StockPrice();
            price.setStockCode(stockCode);
            price.setTradeDate(LocalDate.of(2026, 4, 10).plusDays(i));
            price.setOpenPrice(round(openPrice, 2));
            price.setHighPrice(round(highPrice, 2));
            price.setLowPrice(round(lowPrice, 2));
            price.setClosePrice(round(currentPrice, 2));
            price.setVolume(volume);

            prices.add(price);
        }

        return prices;
    }
}

6.2 投资分析报告

系统自动生成详细的投资分析报告4：

java
java
// 投资分析服务
@Service
public class InvestmentAnalysisService {

    public InvestmentReport generateReport(Long userId) {
        InvestmentReport report = new InvestmentReport();

        // 1. 基本统计信息
        List<TradeRecord> trades = tradeRepository.findByUserId(userId);
        report.setTotalTrades(trades.size());
        report.setWinTrades(calculateWinTrades(trades));
        report.setWinRate((double)report.getWinTrades() / report.getTotalTrades());

        // 2. 收益统计
        AssetDetail finalAsset = profitService.calculateTotalAsset(
            userId, LocalDate.of(2026, 5, 30));
        report.setInitialAsset(5000.00);
        report.setFinalAsset(finalAsset.getTotalAsset());
        report.setProfitAmount(finalAsset.getTotalAsset() - 5000.00);
        report.setProfitRate(finalAsset.getProfitRate());

        // 3. 交易行为分析
        report.setAvgHoldingDays(calculateAverageHoldingDays(trades));
        report.setMaxSingleProfit(findMaxSingleProfit(trades));
        report.setMaxSingleLoss(findMaxSingleLoss(trades));

        // 4. 行业分布分析
        Map<String, Double> industryDistribution =
            calculateIndustryDistribution(userId);
        report.setIndustryDistribution(industryDistribution);

        return report;
    }
}

七、部署与运行说明

7.1 环境要求

根据系统需求，部署环境应满足以下条件45：

  1. 1.Java环境：JDK 1.8或更高版本
  2. 2.数据库：MySQL 5.7或8.0
  3. 3.构建工具：Maven 3.3.9或更高版本
  4. 4.Web服务器：Tomcat 7.0或更高版本
  5. 5.前端构建：Node.js 16.x或更高版本

7.2 快速启动步骤

bash
bash
# 1. 克隆项目代码
git clone [项目仓库地址]

# 2. 配置数据库连接
# 修改 application.yml 中的数据库配置

# 3. 初始化数据库
mysql -u root -p < sql/init.sql

# 4. 构建后端项目
cd backend
mvn clean package

# 5. 启动后端服务
java -jar target/stock-simulator.jar

# 6. 安装前端依赖并启动
cd frontend
npm install
npm run serve

7.3 测试账号

系统预置测试账号供用户体验：

  • 用户名：testuser
  • 密码：123456
  • 初始资金：5000元

八、总结与扩展建议

本模拟炒股网站应用完整实现了用户需求的全部功能，包括实时股票交易、持仓管理、收益计算和数据可视化等核心模块24。系统采用前后端分离架构，确保了良好的扩展性和维护性。

8.1 后续可扩展功能

  1. 1.策略回测功能：允许用户编写和测试交易策略4
  2. 2.社交功能：添加关注、评论、排行榜等社交元素4
  3. 3.移动端适配：开发响应式移动界面或原生APP
  4. 4.多市场支持：扩展支持港股、美股等更多市场
  5. 5.AI助手：集成智能投资助手，提供建议和分析

8.2 教育价值

该系统不仅是一个功能完整的模拟交易平台，更是一个优秀的金融教育工具12。通过实际操作，用户可以：

  • 学习股票交易的基本流程和规则
  • 理解风险管理和资金管理的重要性
  • 培养投资决策能力和市场分析能力
  • 在无风险环境下测试各种投资策略

整个系统设计注重用户体验和功能完整性，界面直观美观，操作流程简单易懂，既适合初学者学习股票交易，也能满足进阶用户测试交易策略的需求15。

上面代码直接预览
MiMo-V2.5-Pro

Here is the complete, self-contained HTML application — open it directly in your browser:

html
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>StockSim · 虚拟交易终端</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#08080c;--sf:#111118;--sf2:#1a1a24;--sf3:#222230;--bd:#2a2a38;
  --acc:#c9a84c;--acc-dim:#8a7233;--acc-g:rgba(201,168,76,.12);
  --up:#e74c3c;--up-bg:rgba(231,76,60,.1);--dn:#27ae60;--dn-bg:rgba(39,174,96,.1);
  --tx:#e8e4dc;--tx2:#b0aaa0;--tx3:#6a6570;
}
html{font-size:14px;scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'DM Mono','Noto Serif SC',monospace;background:var(--bg);color:var(--tx);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:9999}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--sf)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bd);border-radius:3px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--acc-dim)}

/* HEADER */
header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(17,17,24,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);padding:.7rem 1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.header-brand{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:.6rem}
.header-brand h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--acc);letter-spacing:.08em;font-weight:700}
.header-brand span{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--tx3);letter-spacing:.04em}
.time-ctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;background:var(--sf2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:8px;padding:.25rem .5rem}
.time-ctrl button{background:none;border:none;color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;padding:.3rem .5rem;border-radius:4px;font-size:.85rem;transition:all .2s}
.time-ctrl button:hover{color:var(--acc);background:var(--acc-g)}
.time-ctrl button.active{color:var(--acc);background:var(--acc-g)}
.time-ctrl .date-display{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:var(--acc);font-size:.95rem;min-width:110px;text-align:center;font-weight:500}
.header-stats{display:flex;gap:1.2rem}
.hstat{text-align:right}
.hstat .lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.hstat .val{font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;margin-top:2px}
.hstat .val.up{color:var(--up)}.hstat .val.dn{color:var(--dn)}
.speed-sel{display:flex;gap:2px;margin-left:4px}
.speed-sel button{font-size:.7rem;padding:.2rem .4rem}

/* NAV */
nav{display:flex;gap:0;background:var(--sf);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);padding:0 1.5rem;overflow-x:auto}
.nav-tab{background:none;border:none;color:var(--tx3);cursor:pointer;padding:.8rem 1.2rem;font-size:.85rem;font-family:inherit;letter-spacing:.04em;position:relative;transition:color .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.nav-tab:hover{color:var(--tx2)}
.nav-tab.active{color:var(--acc)}
.nav-tab.active::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:1rem;right:1rem;height:2px;background:var(--acc);border-radius:2px 2px 0 0}

/* MAIN */
main{max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.2rem 1.5rem}
.tab-content{display:none;animation:fadeUp .35s ease}
.tab-content.active{display:block}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* MARKET */
.stock-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1rem}
.stock-card{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.stock-card:hover{border-color:var(--acc-dim);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.stock-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px}
.stock-card.up::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--up),transparent)}
.stock-card.dn::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dn),transparent)}
.sc-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.sc-name{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem}
.sc-code{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--tx3)}
.sc-price{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.sc-price.up{color:var(--up)}.sc-price.dn{color:var(--dn)}
.sc-change{font-size:.8rem;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.sc-change.up{color:var(--up)}.sc-change.dn{color:var(--dn)}
.sc-spark{width:100%;height:50px;display:block}
.sc-actions{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.8rem}
.sc-actions button{flex:1;padding:.4rem;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:6px;background:var(--sf2);color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.75rem;transition:all .2s}
.sc-actions button:hover{border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc)}

/* DETAIL MODAL */
.modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:200;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.modal-overlay.show{display:flex}
.modal{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:14px;width:90%;max-width:800px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:1.5rem;position:relative;animation:fadeUp .3s ease}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;background:none;border:none;color:var(--tx3);font-size:1.2rem;cursor:pointer;padding:.3rem}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--tx)}
.modal h2{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.modal .sub{color:var(--tx3);font-size:.8rem;margin-bottom:1rem}
.modal-chart{width:100%;height:280px;margin-bottom:1rem}
.modal-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.m-stat{background:var(--sf2);border-radius:8px;padding:.6rem .8rem}
.m-stat .l{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:3px}
.m-stat .v{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:500}

/* TRADE */
.trade-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px 1fr;gap:1.2rem}
@media(max-width:768px){.trade-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.trade-stocks{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;max-height:500px;overflow-y:auto}
.ts-item{padding:.7rem 1rem;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);transition:background .15s;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.ts-item:hover{background:var(--sf2)}
.ts-item.active{background:var(--acc-g);border-left:3px solid var(--acc)}
.ts-item .ts-n{font-weight:500}.ts-item .ts-p{font-size:.85rem}
.ts-item .ts-p.up{color:var(--up)}.ts-item .ts-p.dn{color:var(--dn)}
.trade-panel{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem}
.tp-type{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:1.2rem;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--bd)}
.tp-type button{flex:1;padding:.6rem;border:none;background:var(--sf2);color:var(--tx3);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.9rem;transition:all .2s}
.tp-type button.active.buy-btn{background:var(--up);color:#fff}
.tp-type button.active.sell-btn{background:var(--dn);color:#fff}
.tp-field{margin-bottom:1rem}
.tp-field label{display:block;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:.35rem;letter-spacing:.04em}
.tp-input{width:100%;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:var(--sf2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:8px;color:var(--tx);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:1rem;outline:none;transition:border .2s}
.tp-input:focus{border-color:var(--acc)}
.tp-input::placeholder{color:var(--tx3)}
.qty-btns{display:flex;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.4rem}
.qty-btns button{padding:.3rem .6rem;background:var(--sf3);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:6px;color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.75rem;transition:all .2s}
.qty-btns button:hover{border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc)}
.tp-info{background:var(--sf2);border-radius:8px;padding:.8rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.8}
.tp-info .row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between}
.tp-info .row .lbl{color:var(--tx3)}
.tp-submit{width:100%;padding:.75rem;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-family:inherit;font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:.06em}
.tp-submit.buy{background:var(--up);color:#fff}
.tp-submit.sell{background:var(--dn);color:#fff}
.tp-submit:hover{filter:brightness(1.15);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.tp-submit:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;filter:none}
.tp-title{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline}
.tp-title .selected-name{color:var(--acc)}

/* PORTFOLIO */
.pf-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.pf-card{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem}
.pf-card .lbl{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--tx3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.pf-card .val{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:500;margin-top:.3rem}
.pf-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
.pf-table th{background:var(--sf2);padding:.6rem .8rem;text-align:left;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.04em;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);position:sticky;top:0}
.pf-table td{padding:.6rem .8rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(42,42,56,.4);font-size:.85rem}
.pf-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(26,26,36,.5)}
.pf-table .up{color:var(--up)}.pf-table .dn{color:var(--dn)}
.pf-table-wrap{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;overflow:auto;max-height:500px}

/* HISTORY */
.hist-filter{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hist-filter button{padding:.35rem .8rem;background:var(--sf2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:6px;color:var(--tx3);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.75rem;transition:all .2s}
.hist-filter button.active{border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc);background:var(--acc-g)}
.hist-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
.hist-table th{background:var(--sf2);padding:.6rem .8rem;text-align:left;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--tx3);font-weight:400;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);position:sticky;top:0}
.hist-table td{padding:.5rem .8rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(42,42,56,.3);font-size:.82rem}
.hist-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(26,26,36,.5)}
.hist-wrap{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;overflow:auto;max-height:500px}
.badge{padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500}
.badge.buy{background:var(--up-bg);color:var(--up)}
.badge.sell{background:var(--dn-bg);color:var(--dn)}

/* ANALYSIS */
.an-charts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
@media(max-width:900px){.an-charts{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.chart-box{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem}
.chart-box h3{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;color:var(--tx2)}
.chart-box canvas{width:100%!important;max-height:280px}
.an-metrics{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:1rem}
.an-metric{background:var(--sf);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;text-align:center}
.an-metric .ml{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.an-metric .mv{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:500}

/* SETTLEMENT */
.settle-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:300;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.settle-overlay.show{display:flex}
.settle-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--sf) 0%,#161622 100%);border:1px solid var(--acc-dim);border-radius:16px;padding:2.5rem;width:90%;max-width:500px;text-align:center;animation:fadeUp .4s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.settle-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc),var(--up),var(--acc))}
.settle-card h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--acc);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.settle-card .s-sub{color:var(--tx3);font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.s-big{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.3rem;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace}
.s-big.up{color:var(--up)}.s-big.dn{color:var(--dn)}
.s-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:.5rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(42,42,56,.4);font-size:.85rem}
.s-row .sl{color:var(--tx3)}
.s-btn{margin-top:1.5rem;padding:.7rem 2rem;background:var(--acc);color:var(--bg);border:none;border-radius:8px;font-family:inherit;font-size:.9rem;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;transition:all .2s}
.s-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.15)}

/* TOAST */
#toast-container{position:fixed;top:60px;right:20px;z-index:10000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;pointer-events:none}
.toast{padding:10px 18px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.82rem;transform:translateX(120%);transition:transform .3s ease;pointer-events:auto;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);max-width:320px}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.toast-success{background:rgba(39,174,96,.92);color:#fff}
.toast-error{background:rgba(231,76,60,.92);color:#fff}
.toast-info{background:rgba(52,152,219,.92);color:#fff}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:768px){
  header{padding:.5rem .8rem}
  .header-brand h1{font-size:1.2rem}
  .header-stats{gap:.6rem}
  .hstat .val{font-size:.85rem}
  main{padding:.8rem}
  .stock-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .modal{width:95%;padding:1rem}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .stock-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .header-stats{display:none}
  .time-ctrl{font-size:.8rem}
}

.empty-state{text-align:center;padding:3rem;color:var(--tx3);font-size:.9rem}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="header-brand">
    <h1>STOCKSIM</h1>
    <span>虚拟交易终端 · 模拟炒股</span>
  </div>
  <div class="time-ctrl">
    <button onclick="App.prevDay()" title="上一天">◀</button>
    <span class="date-display" id="dateDisp">2026-04-10</span>
    <button onclick="App.nextDay()" title="下一天">▶</button>
    <button onclick="App.toggleAuto()" id="autoBtn" title="自动播放">⏩ 自动</button>
    <div class="speed-sel">
      <button onclick="App.setSpeed(1)" id="sp1" class="active">1×</button>
      <button onclick="App.setSpeed(2)" id="sp2">2×</button>
      <button onclick="App.setSpeed(4)" id="sp4">4×</button>
    </div>
    <button onclick="App.reset()" title="重置" style="margin-left:6px;color:var(--tx3)">↺</button>
  </div>
  <div class="header-stats">
    <div class="hstat"><div class="lbl">总资产</div><div class="val" id="hTotal">¥5,000.00</div></div>
    <div class="hstat"><div class="lbl">可用资金</div><div class="val" id="hCash">¥5,000.00</div></div>
    <div class="hstat"><div class="lbl">总收益</div><div class="val up" id="hProfit">+¥0.00 (0.00%)</div></div>
  </div>
</header>

<nav>
  <button class="nav-tab active" data-tab="market" onclick="App.switchTab('market')">行情总览</button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-tab="trade" onclick="App.switchTab('trade')">交易下单</button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-tab="portfolio" onclick="App.switchTab('portfolio')">我的持仓</button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-tab="history" onclick="App.switchTab('history')">交易记录</button>
  <button class="nav-tab" data-tab="analysis" onclick="App.switchTab('analysis')">收益分析</button>
</nav>

<main>
  <!-- MARKET -->
  <div id="market-tab" class="tab-content active">
    <div class="stock-grid" id="stockGrid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- TRADE -->
  <div id="trade-tab" class="tab-content">
    <div class="trade-layout">
      <div class="trade-stocks" id="tradeStocks"></div>
      <div class="trade-panel" id="tradePanel">
        <div class="tp-title"><span>下单</span><span class="selected-name" id="selName">请选择股票</span></div>
        <div class="tp-type">
          <button class="buy-btn active" onclick="App.setTradeType('buy')">买入</button>
          <button class="sell-btn" onclick="App.setTradeType('sell')">卖出</button>
        </div>
        <div class="tp-field">
          <label>委托价格 (元)</label>
          <input type="number" class="tp-input" id="tradePrice" step="0.01" min="0.01" placeholder="0.00">
        </div>
        <div class="tp-field">
          <label>委托数量 (股) — 最小100股，递增100股</label>
          <input type="number" class="tp-input" id="tradeQty" step="100" min="100" placeholder="100">
          <div class="qty-btns">
            <button onclick="App.setQty(100)">100</button>
            <button onclick="App.setQty(200)">200</button>
            <button onclick="App.setQty(500)">500</button>
            <button onclick="App.setQty(1000)">1000</button>
            <button onclick="App.setMaxQty()">最大</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tp-info" id="tradeInfo">
          <div class="row"><span class="lbl">股票</span><span>-</span></div>
          <div class="row"><span class="lbl">预估金额</span><span>¥0.00</span></div>
          <div class="row"><span class="lbl">手续费</span><span>¥0.00</span></div>
          <div class="row"><span class="lbl">可用资金</span><span>¥5,000.00</span></div>
        </div>
        <button class="tp-submit buy" id="submitBtn" onclick="App.submitOrder()" disabled>确认买入</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PORTFOLIO -->
  <div id="portfolio-tab" class="tab-content">
    <div class="pf-summary" id="pfSummary"></div>
    <div class="pf-table-wrap">
      <table class="pf-table" id="pfTable">
        <thead><tr>
          <th>股票</th><th>持仓(股)</th><th>成本价</th><th>现价</th><th>市值</th><th>盈亏</th><th>盈亏%</th><th>操作</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="pfBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- HISTORY -->
  <div id="history-tab" class="tab-content">
    <div class="hist-filter" id="histFilter"></div>
    <div class="hist-wrap">
      <table class="hist-table">
        <thead><tr>
          <th>时间</th><th>股票</th><th>方向</th><th>价格</th><th>数量</th><th>金额</th><th>手续费</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="histBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ANALYSIS -->
  <div id="analysis-tab" class="tab-content">
    <div class="an-charts">
      <div class="chart-box"><h3>资产总值走势</h3><canvas id="chartAsset"></canvas></div>
      <div class="chart-box"><h3>持仓结构</h3><canvas id="chartAlloc"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <div class="an-metrics" id="anMetrics"></div>
  </div>
</main>

<!-- DETAIL MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="detailModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="App.closeModal()">✕</button>
    <h2 id="dmName"></h2>
    <div class="sub" id="dmSub"></div>
    <div class="modal-chart"><canvas id="dmChart"></canvas></div>
    <div class="modal-stats" id="dmStats"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem">
      <button class="tp-submit buy" style="flex:1" onclick="App.quickBuy()">买入</button>
      <button class="tp-submit sell" style="flex:1" onclick="App.quickSell()">卖出</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SETTLEMENT -->
<div class="settle-overlay" id="settleOverlay">
  <div class="settle-card">
    <h2>投资结算报告</h2>
    <div class="s-sub">2026年4月10日 — 5月29日 · 交易期结束</div>
    <div class="s-big" id="sProfit"></div>
    <div style="color:var(--tx3);font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem" id="sRate"></div>
    <div id="sDetails"></div>
    <button class="s-btn" onclick="App.closeSettle()">查看详细分析</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="toast-container"></div>

<script>
/* =====================================================
   STOCK SIMULATOR APPLICATION
   ===================================================== */
const App = {
  // ── Config ──
  INIT_CASH: 5000,
  COMMISSION_RATE: 0.00025,
  MIN_COMMISSION: 5,
  STAMP_TAX: 0.0005,
  LOT: 100,

  // ── Stock Definitions ──
  STOCK_DEFS: [
    { code:'600010', name:'包钢股份', startPrice:2.15,  drift:0.05, vol:0.35, sector:'钢铁' },
    { code:'000725', name:'京东方A',  startPrice:5.20,  drift:0.08, vol:0.30, sector:'电子' },
    { code:'601988', name:'中国银行', startPrice:4.85,  drift:0.03, vol:0.15, sector:'银行' },
    { code:'601012', name:'隆基绿能', startPrice:23.50, drift:-0.05,vol:0.35, sector:'新能源' },
    { code:'600036', name:'招商银行', startPrice:37.80, drift:0.06, vol:0.20, sector:'银行' },
    { code:'600900', name:'长江电力', startPrice:29.50, drift:0.04, vol:0.15, sector:'电力' },
    { code:'601318', name:'中国平安', startPrice:46.50, drift:0.07, vol:0.25, sector:'保险' },
    { code:'000625', name:'长安汽车', startPrice:15.80, drift:0.12, vol:0.32, sector:'汽车' },
  ],

  // ── State ──
  stocks: {},
  tradingDays: [],
  dayIdx: 0,
  cash: 5000,
  holdings: {},
  transactions: [],
  portfolioHistory: [],
  tradeType: 'buy',
  selectedStock: null,
  activeTab: 'market',
  autoTimer: null,
  speed: 1,
  chartInstances: {},
  settled: false,

  // ── Init ──
  init() {
    this.cash = this.INIT_CASH;
    this.holdings = {};
    this.transactions = [];
    this.portfolioHistory = [];
    this.dayIdx = 0;
    this.settled = false;
    this.generateDays();
    this.initStocks();
    this.generateAllPrices();
    this.recordPortfolio();
    this.updateHeader();
    this.renderCurrentTab();
    this.bindInputs();
  },

  reset() {
    if (this.autoTimer) this.toggleAuto();
    Object.values(this.chartInstances).forEach(c => { try{c.destroy()}catch(e){} });
    this.chartInstances = {};
    this.selectedStock = null;
    this.init();
    showToast('模拟已重置','info');
  },

  // ── Date Generation ──
  generateDays() {
    this.tradingDays = [];
    const s = new Date(2026, 3, 10);
    const e = new Date(2026, 4, 29);
    for (let d = new Date(s); d <= e; d.setDate(d.getDate()+1)) {
      const dow = d.getDay();
      if (dow !== 0 && dow !== 6) {
        this.tradingDays.push(new Date(d));
      }
    }
  },

  formatDate(d) {
    const y = d.getFullYear();
    const m = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');
    const dd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    return `${y}-${m}-${dd}`;
  },

  // ── Seeded Random ──
  _seed: 42,
  srand() {
    this._seed = (this._seed * 16807 + 0) % 2147483647;
    return this._seed / 2147483647;
  },
  randNormal() {
    let u = 0, v = 0;
    while (u === 0) u = this.srand();
    while (v === 0) v = this.srand();
    return Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(u)) * Math.cos(2 * Math.PI * v);
  },

  // ── Stock Price Generation ──
  initStocks() {
    this.stocks = {};
    this.STOCK_DEFS.forEach(def => {
      this.stocks[def.code] = { ...def, prices: [] };
    });
  },

  generateAllPrices() {
    const n = this.tradingDays.length;
    Object.values(this.stocks).forEach(stock => {
      const prices = [];
      let price = stock.startPrice;
      const dailyDrift = stock.drift / 252;
      const dailyVol = stock.vol / Math.sqrt(252);

      for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        const z = this.randNormal();
        const ret = dailyDrift - 0.5 * dailyVol * dailyVol + dailyVol * z;
        price = price * Math.exp(ret);

        const prevClose = i > 0 ? prices[i-1].close : price;
        const limitUp = prevClose * 1.10;
        const limitDown = prevClose * 0.90;
        price = Math.max(limitDown, Math.min(limitUp, price));

        const open = price * (0.985 + this.srand() * 0.03);
        const high = Math.max(price, open) * (1 + this.srand() * 0.015);
        const low = Math.min(price, open) * (1 - this.srand() * 0.015);
        const vol = Math.floor((500000 + this.srand() * 3000000) * (stock.startPrice < 10 ? 2 : 1));

        prices.push({
          open:  this.round(open),
          high:  this.round(Math.max(high, price)),
          low:   this.round(Math.min(low, price)),
          close: this.round(price),
          volume: vol
        });
      }
      stock.prices = prices;
    });
  },

  round(v) { return Math.round(v * 100) / 100; },

  getPrice(code) {
    return this.stocks[code]?.prices[this.dayIdx]?.close || 0;
  },

  getPrevPrice(code) {
    const idx = Math.max(0, this.dayIdx - 1);
    return this.stocks[code]?.prices[idx]?.close || this.getPrice(code);
  },

  // ── Commission ──
  calcBuyFee(amount) {
    return Math.max(amount * this.COMMISSION_RATE, this.MIN_COMMISSION);
  },
  calcSellFee(amount) {
    const comm = Math.max(amount * this.COMMISSION_RATE, this.MIN_COMMISSION);
    const stamp = amount * this.STAMP_TAX;
    return this.round(comm + stamp);
  },

  // ── Day Navigation ──
  setDay(idx) {
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= this.tradingDays.length) return;
    this.dayIdx = idx;
    this.refreshAvailable();
    this.recordPortfolio();
    this.updateHeader();
    this.renderCurrentTab();
    document.getElementById('dateDisp').textContent = this.formatDate(this.tradingDays[this.dayIdx]);
  },

  nextDay() {
    if (this.dayIdx >= this.tradingDays.length - 1) {
      if (this.autoTimer) this.toggleAuto();
      if (!this.settled) this.showSettlement();
      return;
    }
    this.setDay(this.dayIdx + 1);
  },

  prevDay() {
    this.setDay(Math.max(0, this.dayIdx - 1));
  },

  toggleAuto() {
    if (this.autoTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.autoTimer);
      this.autoTimer = null;
      document.getElementById('autoBtn').classList.remove('active');
      document.getElementById('autoBtn').textContent = '⏩ 自动';
    } else {
      const ms = [2000, 1000, 500][this.speed - 1] || 1000;
      this.autoTimer = setInterval(() => this.nextDay(), ms);
      document.getElementById('autoBtn').classList.add('active');
      document.getElementById('autoBtn').textContent = '⏸ 暂停';
    }
  },

  setSpeed(s) {
    this.speed = s;
    [1,2,4].forEach(v => document.getElementById('sp'+v).classList.toggle('active', v===s));
    if (this.autoTimer) { this.toggleAuto(); this.toggleAuto(); }
  },

  // ── Holdings Helpers ──
  refreshAvailable() {
    Object.keys(this.holdings).forEach(code => {
      const h = this.holdings[code];
      if (h) h.available = h.totalShares;
    });
  },

  holdingValue(code) {
    return (this.holdings[code]?.totalShares || 0) * this.getPrice(code);
  },

  totalHoldingsValue() {
    let v = 0;
    Object.keys(this.holdings).forEach(c => { v += this.holdingValue(c); });
    return this.round(v);
  },

  totalAsset() { return this.round(this.cash + this.totalHoldingsValue()); },
  totalProfit() { return this.round(this.totalAsset() - this.INIT_CASH); },
  profitRate() { return ((this.totalAsset() - this.INIT_CASH) / this.INIT_CASH * 100); },

  recordPortfolio() {
    this.portfolioHistory[this.dayIdx] = {
      day: this.formatDate(this.tradingDays[this.dayIdx]),
      total: this.totalAsset(),
      cash: this.round(this.cash),
      holdings: this.totalHoldingsValue()
    };
  },

  // ── Header Update ──
  updateHeader() {
    const total = this.totalAsset();
    const profit = this.totalProfit();
    const rate = this.profitRate();
    const isUp = profit >= 0;

    document.getElementById('hTotal').textContent = '¥' + total.toLocaleString('zh-CN', {minimumFractionDigits:2});
    document.getElementById('hCash').textContent = '¥' + this.round(this.cash).toLocaleString('zh-CN', {minimumFractionDigits:2});

    const hpEl = document.getElementById('hProfit');
    hpEl.textContent = (isUp?'+':'') + '¥' + profit.toLocaleString('zh-CN',{minimumFractionDigits:2}) + ' (' + (isUp?'+':'') + rate.toFixed(2) + '%)';
    hpEl.className = 'val ' + (isUp ? 'up' : 'dn');
  },

  // ── Tab Switching ──
  switchTab(tab) {
    this.activeTab = tab;
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.tab === tab));
    document.getElementById(tab + '-tab').classList.add('active');
    this.renderCurrentTab();
  },

  renderCurrentTab() {
    switch(this.activeTab) {
      case 'market': this.renderMarket(); break;
      case 'trade': this.renderTrade(); break;
      case 'portfolio': this.renderPortfolio(); break;
      case 'history': this.renderHistory(); break;
      case 'analysis': this.renderAnalysis(); break;
    }
  },

  // ── MARKET ──
  renderMarket() {
    const grid = document.getElementById('stockGrid');
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    Object.values(this.stocks).forEach(stock => {
      const cur = stock.prices[this.dayIdx];
      const prev = this.dayIdx > 0 ? stock.prices[this.dayIdx-1] : cur;
      const chg = cur.close - prev.close;
      const pct = (chg / prev.close * 100);
      const isUp = chg >= 0;

      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'stock-card ' + (isUp?'up':'dn');
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="sc-head">
          <span class="sc-name">${stock.name}</span>
          <span class="sc-code">${stock.code} · ${stock.sector}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-price ${isUp?'up':'dn'}">¥${cur.close.toFixed(2)}</div>
        <div class="sc-change ${isUp?'up':'dn'}">${isUp?'+':''}${chg.toFixed(2)}  (${isUp?'+':''}${pct.toFixed(2)}%)</div>
        <canvas class="sc-spark" width="300" height="50"></canvas>
        <div class="sc-actions">
          <button onclick="event.stopPropagation();App.goTrade('${stock.code}','buy')">买入</button>
          <button onclick="event.stopPropagation();App.goTrade('${stock.code}','sell')">卖出</button>
        </div>
      `;
      card.addEventListener('click', () => this.showDetail(stock.code));
      grid.appendChild(card);

      const data = stock.prices.slice(0, this.dayIdx+1).map(p=>p.close);
      this.drawSparkline(card.querySelector('.sc-spark'), data, isUp?'#e74c3c':'#27ae60');
    });
  },

  drawSparkline(canvas, data, color) {
    if (!canvas || data.length < 2) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const w = canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth * 2;
    const h = canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight * 2;
    ctx.scale(2, 2);
    const dw = w/2, dh = h/2;
    const pad = 2;
    const mn = Math.min(...data), mx = Math.max(...data);
    const range = mx - mn || 1;
    const pts = data.map((v,i) => ({
      x: pad + (i/(data.length-1))*(dw-2*pad),
      y: pad + (1-(v-mn)/range)*(dh-2*pad)
    }));

    const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,dh);
    grad.addColorStop(0, color+'55');
    grad.addColorStop(1, color+'00');
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(pts[0].x, dh);
    pts.forEach(p => ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y));
    ctx.lineTo(pts[pts.length-1].x, dh);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.beginPath();
    pts.forEach((p,i) => i===0?ctx.moveTo(p.x,p.y):ctx.lineTo(p.x,p.y));
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
  },

  // ── DETAIL MODAL ──
  showDetail(code) {
    const stock = this.stocks[code];
    const cur = stock.prices[this.dayIdx];
    const prev = this.dayIdx > 0 ? stock.prices[this.dayIdx-1] : cur;
    const chg = cur.close - prev.close;
    const pct = chg/prev.close*100;
    const isUp = chg >= 0;

    document.getElementById('dmName').textContent = stock.name + ' (' + stock.code + ')';
    document.getElementById('dmSub').textContent = stock.sector + ' · ' + stock.market;

    const stats = [
      {l:'当前价', v:'¥'+cur.close.toFixed(2)},
      {l:'涨跌额', v:(isUp?'+':'')+chg.toFixed(2), cls:isUp?'up':'dn'},
      {l:'涨跌幅', v:(isUp?'+':'')+pct.toFixed(2)+'%', cls:isUp?'up':'dn'},
      {l:'开盘价', v:'¥'+cur.open.toFixed(2)},
      {l:'最高价', v:'¥'+cur.high.toFixed(2)},
      {l:'最低价', v:'¥'+cur.low.toFixed(2)},
      {l:'成交量', v:cur.volume.toLocaleString()},
      {l:'持仓股数', v:(this.holdings[code]?.totalShares||0).toString()},
    ];
    const dmStats = document.getElementById('dmStats');
    dmStats.innerHTML = stats.map(s => `<div class="m-stat"><div class="l">${s.l}</div><div class="v ${s.cls||''}">${s.v}</div></div>`).join('');

    this.selectedStock = code;
    document.getElementById('detailModal').classList.add('show');

    setTimeout(() => {
      if (this.chartInstances.dmChart) this.chartInstances.dmChart.destroy();
      const ctx = document.getElementById('dmChart').getContext('2d');
      const prices = stock.prices.slice(0, this.dayIdx+1);
      const labels = this.tradingDays.slice(0, this.dayIdx+1).map(d => this.formatDate(d));
      const closes = prices.map(p => p.close);

      this.chartInstances.dmChart = new Chart(ctx, {
        type:'line',
        data:{
          labels,
          datasets:[{
            label: stock.name,
            data: closes,
            borderColor: isUp?'#e74c3c':'#27ae60',
            backgroundColor: (isUp?'rgba(231,76,60,.08)':'rgba(39,174,96,.08)'),
            fill: true,
            tension: 0.3,
            pointRadius: 2,
            pointHoverRadius: 5,
            borderWidth: 2
          }]
        },
        options:{
          responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
          plugins:{legend:{display:false},
            tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(17,17,24,.95)',titleColor:'#c9a84c',bodyColor:'#e8e4dc',borderColor:'#2a2a38',borderWidth:1,padding:10,displayColors:false,
              callbacks:{label:ctx=>'¥'+ctx.parsed.y.toFixed(2)}}
          },
          scales:{
            x:{ticks:{color:'#6a6570',maxTicksLimit:8,font:{family:"'DM Mono'"}},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}},
            y:{ticks:{color:'#6a6570',font:{family:"'DM Mono'"},callback:v=>'¥'+v.toFixed(0)},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}}
          }
        }
      });
    }, 50);
  },

  closeModal() {
    document.getElementById('detailModal').classList.remove('show');
  },

  quickBuy() {
    this.closeModal();
    this.goTrade(this.selectedStock, 'buy');
  },
  quickSell() {
    this.closeModal();
    this.goTrade(this.selectedStock, 'sell');
  },

  // ── TRADE ──
  goTrade(code, type) {
    this.selectedStock = code;
    this.tradeType = type || 'buy';
    this.switchTab('trade');
  },

  setTradeType(type) {
    this.tradeType = type;
    document.querySelectorAll('.tp-type button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelector(`.tp-type .${type}-btn`).classList.add('active');
    this.updateTradeUI();
  },

  renderTrade() {
    const list = document.getElementById('tradeStocks');
    list.innerHTML = '';
    Object.values(this.stocks).forEach(stock => {
      const price = this.getPrice(stock.code);
      const prev = this.getPrevPrice(stock.code);
      const chg = price - prev;
      const isUp = chg >= 0;
      const item = document.createElement('div');
      item.className = 'ts-item' + (this.selectedStock===stock.code?' active':'');
      item.innerHTML = `<span class="ts-n">${stock.name}</span><span class="ts-p ${isUp?'up':'dn'}">¥${price.toFixed(2)}</span>`;
      item.onclick = () => { this.selectedStock = stock.code; this.renderTrade(); };
      list.appendChild(item);
    });

    if (this.selectedStock) {
      const price = this.getPrice(this.selectedStock);
      document.getElementById('tradePrice').value = price.toFixed(2);
    }
    this.updateTradeUI();
  },

  updateTradeUI() {
    const code = this.selectedStock;
    const price = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tradePrice').value) || 0;
    const qty = parseInt(document.getElementById('tradeQty').value) || 0;
    const amount = price * qty;

    document.getElementById('selName').textContent = code ? this.stocks[code].name : '请选择股票';

    if (this.tradeType === 'buy') {
      const fee = this.calcBuyFee(amount);
      const total = amount + fee;
      document.getElementById('tradeInfo').innerHTML = `
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">股票</span><span>${code?this.stocks[code].name:'-'}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">预估金额</span><span>¥${amount.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">手续费</span><span>¥${fee.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">合计</span><span style="color:var(--acc)">¥${total.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">可用资金</span><span>¥${this.round(this.cash).toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      `;
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').className = 'tp-submit buy';
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').textContent = '确认买入';
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').disabled = !code || qty < 100 || total > this.cash;
    } else {
      const holding = this.holdings[code];
      const avail = holding ? holding.available : 0;
      const fee = this.calcSellFee(amount);
      const net = amount - fee;
      document.getElementById('tradeInfo').innerHTML = `
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">股票</span><span>${code?this.stocks[code].name:'-'}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">预估金额</span><span>¥${amount.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">手续费+印花税</span><span>¥${fee.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">实际到账</span><span style="color:var(--acc)">¥${net.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
        <div class="row"><span class="lbl">可卖数量</span><span>${avail}股</span></div>
      `;
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').className = 'tp-submit sell';
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').textContent = '确认卖出';
      document.getElementById('submitBtn').disabled = !code || qty < 100 || qty > avail;
    }
  },

  setQty(n) { document.getElementById('tradeQty').value = n; this.updateTradeUI(); },
  setMaxQty() {
    const code = this.selectedStock;
    if (!code) return;
    const price = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tradePrice').value) || 0;
    if (this.tradeType === 'buy') {
      const maxShares = Math.floor(this.cash / (price * 1.001)) ;
      const rounded = Math.floor(maxShares / 100) * 100;
      document.getElementById('tradeQty').value = Math.max(0, rounded);
    } else {
      const avail = this.holdings[code]?.available || 0;
      document.getElementById('tradeQty').value = Math.floor(avail/100)*100;
    }
    this.updateTradeUI();
  },

  bindInputs() {
    ['tradePrice','tradeQty'].forEach(id => {
      document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', () => this.updateTradeUI());
    });
  },

  submitOrder() {
    const code = this.selectedStock;
    if (!code) return;
    const price = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tradePrice').value);
    const qty = parseInt(document.getElementById('tradeQty').value);
    if (!price || !qty || qty % 100 !== 0) { showToast('请输入有效价格和数量','error'); return; }

    if (this.tradeType === 'buy') {
      this.executeBuy(code, price, qty);
    } else {
      this.executeSell(code, price, qty);
    }
  },

  executeBuy(code, price, qty) {
    const amount = price * qty;
    const fee = this.calcBuyFee(amount);
    const total = amount + fee;
    if (total > this.cash) { showToast('可用资金不足','error'); return; }

    this.cash -= total;
    if (!this.holdings[code]) {
      this.holdings[code] = { totalShares:0, avgCost:0, totalCost:0, available:0 };
    }
    const h = this.holdings[code];
    h.totalCost += amount;
    h.totalShares += qty;
    h.avgCost = this.round(h.totalCost / h.totalShares);
    h.available += qty; // allow sell same day for simplicity, or set 0 for T+1

    this.transactions.push({
      time: this.formatDate(this.tradingDays[this.dayIdx]) + ' ' + String(9+Math.floor(this.srand()*4)).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(Math.floor(this.srand()*60)).padStart(2,'0'),
      code, name: this.stocks[code].name, type:'buy', price, qty, amount, fee: this.round(fee)
    });

    showToast(`买入 ${this.stocks[code].name} ${qty}股 @ ¥${price.toFixed(2)}`,'success');
    this.updateHeader();
    this.renderTrade();
    if (this.activeTab === 'portfolio') this.renderPortfolio();
  },

  executeSell(code, price, qty) {
    const h = this.holdings[code];
    if (!h || qty > h.available) { showToast('可卖数量不足','error'); return; }

    const amount = price * qty;
    const fee = this.calcSellFee(amount);
    const net = amount - fee;

    this.cash += net;
    h.totalShares -= qty;
    h.totalCost = h.avgCost * h.totalShares;
    h.available -= qty;

    if (h.totalShares <= 0) delete this.holdings[code];

    this.transactions.push({
      time: this.formatDate(this.tradingDays[this.dayIdx]) + ' ' + String(9+Math.floor(this.srand()*4)).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(Math.floor(this.srand()*60)).padStart(2,'0'),
      code, name: this.stocks[code].name, type:'sell', price, qty, amount, fee: this.round(fee)
    });

    showToast(`卖出 ${this.stocks[code].name} ${qty}股 @ ¥${price.toFixed(2)}`,'success');
    this.updateHeader();
    this.renderTrade();
    if (this.activeTab === 'portfolio') this.renderPortfolio();
  },

  // ── PORTFOLIO ──
  renderPortfolio() {
    const totalVal = this.totalHoldingsValue();
    const totalCost = Object.values(this.holdings).reduce((s,h)=>s+h.totalCost, 0);
    const totalPL = totalVal - totalCost;
    const plPct = totalCost > 0 ? (totalPL/totalCost*100) : 0;
    const isUp = totalPL >= 0;

    document.getElementById('pfSummary').innerHTML = `
      <div class="pf-card"><div class="lbl">持仓市值</div><div class="val">¥${this.round(totalVal).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}</div></div>
      <div class="pf-card"><div class="lbl">持仓成本</div><div class="val" style="color:var(--tx2)">¥${this.round(totalCost).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}</div></div>
      <div class="pf-card"><div class="lbl">浮动盈亏</div><div class="val ${isUp?'up':'dn'}">${isUp?'+':''}¥${this.round(totalPL).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}</div></div>
      <div class="pf-card"><div class="lbl">持仓盈亏率</div><div class="val ${isUp?'up':'dn'}">${isUp?'+':''}${plPct.toFixed(2)}%</div></div>
    `;

    const body = document.getElementById('pfBody');
    if (Object.keys(this.holdings).length === 0) {
      body.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="empty-state">暂无持仓</td></tr>';
      return;
    }

    body.innerHTML = '';
    Object.entries(this.holdings).forEach(([code, h]) => {
      const price = this.getPrice(code);
      const val = h.totalShares * price;
      const pl = val - h.totalCost;
      const plP = h.totalCost > 0 ? (pl/h.totalCost*100) : 0;
      const isU = pl >= 0;
      body.innerHTML += `<tr>
        <td>${this.stocks[code].name}<br><span style="color:var(--tx3);font-size:.75rem">${code}</span></td>
        <td>${h.totalShares}</td>
        <td>¥${h.avgCost.toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td>¥${price.toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td>¥${this.round(val).toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td class="${isU?'up':'dn'}">${isU?'+':''}¥${this.round(pl).toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td class="${isU?'up':'dn'}">${isU?'+':''}${plP.toFixed(2)}%</td>
        <td><button style="padding:3px 10px;background:var(--sf2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:4px;color:var(--tx2);cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;font-family:inherit" onclick="App.goTrade('${code}','sell')">卖出</button></td>
      </tr>`;
    });
  },

  // ── HISTORY ──
  renderHistory() {
    const histFilter = document.getElementById('histFilter');
    const codes = [...new Set(this.transactions.map(t=>t.code))];
    histFilter.innerHTML = '<button class="active" onclick="App.filterHist(\'all\')">全部</button>' +
      codes.map(c => `<button onclick="App.filterHist('${c}')">${this.stocks[c]?.name||c}</button>`).join('');

    this.renderHistTable('all');
  },

  filterHist(code) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.hist-filter button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    event.target.classList.add('active');
    this.renderHistTable(code);
  },

  renderHistTable(filter) {
    const body = document.getElementById('histBody');
    const txs = filter === 'all' ? [...this.transactions] : this.transactions.filter(t=>t.code===filter);
    if (txs.length === 0) {
      body.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state">暂无交易记录</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    body.innerHTML = [...txs].reverse().map(t => `
      <tr>
        <td>${t.time}</td>
        <td>${t.name}<br><span style="color:var(--tx3);font-size:.7rem">${t.code}</span></td>
        <td><span class="badge ${t.type}">${t.type==='buy'?'买入':'卖出'}</span></td>
        <td>¥${t.price.toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td>${t.qty}</td>
        <td>¥${t.amount.toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td>¥${t.fee.toFixed(2)}</td>
      </tr>
    `).join('');
  },

  // ── ANALYSIS ──
  renderAnalysis() {
    this.renderAssetChart();
    this.renderAllocChart();
    this.renderMetrics();
  },

  renderAssetChart() {
    if (this.chartInstances.asset) this.chartInstances.asset.destroy();
    const ctx = document.getElementById('chartAsset').getContext('2d');
    const history = this.portfolioHistory.filter(h=>h);
    const labels = history.map(h=>h.day);
    const data = history.map(h=>h.total);

    const colors = data.map(v => v >= this.INIT_CASH ? 'rgba(231,76,60,.7)' : 'rgba(39,174,96,.7)');

    this.chartInstances.asset = new Chart(ctx, {
      type:'line',
      data:{
        labels,
        datasets:[
          {
            label:'总资产',
            data,
            borderColor:'#c9a84c',
            backgroundColor:'rgba(201,168,76,.08)',
            fill:true, tension:.3, pointRadius:2, pointHoverRadius:5, borderWidth:2
          },
          {
            label:'初始资金',
            data: new Array(data.length).fill(this.INIT_CASH),
            borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,.15)',
            borderDash:[6,4],
            pointRadius:0, borderWidth:1, fill:false
          }
        ]
      },
      options:{
        responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
        plugins:{
          legend:{labels:{color:'#b0aaa0',font:{family:"'DM Mono'"}}},
          tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(17,17,24,.95)',titleColor:'#c9a84c',bodyColor:'#e8e4dc',borderColor:'#2a2a38',borderWidth:1,padding:10,
            callbacks:{label:ctx=>ctx.dataset.label+': ¥'+ctx.parsed.y.toFixed(2)}}
        },
        scales:{
          x:{ticks:{color:'#6a6570',maxTicksLimit:10,font:{family:"'DM Mono'"}},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}},
          y:{ticks:{color:'#6a6570',font:{family:"'DM Mono'"},callback:v=>'¥'+v.toFixed(0)},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}}
        }
      }
    });
  },

  renderAllocChart() {
    if (this.chartInstances.alloc) this.chartInstances.alloc.destroy();
    const ctx = document.getElementById('chartAlloc').getContext('2d');

    const labels = ['现金'];
    const data = [this.round(this.cash)];
    const bgColors = ['rgba(201,168,76,.8)'];

    const palette = [
      'rgba(231,76,60,.75)','rgba(52,152,219,.75)','rgba(39,174,96,.75)',
      'rgba(155,89,182,.75)','rgba(241,196,15,.75)','rgba(230,126,34,.75)',
      'rgba(26,188,156,.75)','rgba(192,57,43,.75)'
    ];

    let pi = 0;
    Object.entries(this.holdings).forEach(([code, h]) => {
      const val = h.totalShares * this.getPrice(code);
      if (val > 0) {
        labels.push(this.stocks[code].name);
        data.push(this.round(val));
        bgColors.push(palette[pi % palette.length]);
        pi++;
      }
    });

    this.chartInstances.alloc = new Chart(ctx, {
      type:'doughnut',
      data:{ labels, datasets:[{ data, backgroundColor:bgColors, borderColor:'#111118', borderWidth:2 }] },
      options:{
        responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
        plugins:{
          legend:{position:'right',labels:{color:'#b0aaa0',font:{family:"'DM Mono'",size:11},padding:12}},
          tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(17,17,24,.95)',titleColor:'#c9a84c',bodyColor:'#e8e4dc',borderColor:'#2a2a38',borderWidth:1,
            callbacks:{label:ctx=>' '+ctx.label+': ¥'+ctx.parsed.toFixed(2)}}
        }
      }
    });
  },

  renderMetrics() {
    const buys = this.transactions.filter(t=>t.type==='buy');
    const sells = this.transactions.filter(t=>t.type==='sell');

    const closedTrades = [];
    sells.forEach(sell => {
      const buy = buys.find(b => b.code === sell.code && !b._matched);
      if (buy) {
        buy._matched = true;
        closedTrades.push({ code:sell.code, name:sell.name, profit: (sell.price - buy.price) * sell.qty });
      }
    });
    buys.forEach(b => delete b._matched);

    const winTrades = closedTrades.filter(t=>t.profit>0);
    const bestTrade = closedTrades.length ? closedTrades.reduce((a,b)=>a.profit>b.profit?a:b) : null;
    const worstTrade = closedTrades.length ? closedTrades.reduce((a,b)=>a.profit<b.profit?a:b) : null;
    const totalFees = this.transactions.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee, 0);

    const profit = this.totalProfit();
    const isUp = profit >= 0;

    const metrics = [
      {l:'总收益率', v:(isUp?'+':'')+this.profitRate().toFixed(2)+'%', cls:isUp?'up':'dn'},
      {l:'总盈亏', v:(isUp?'+':'')+'¥'+profit.toFixed(2), cls:isUp?'up':'dn'},
      {l:'总交易次数', v:this.transactions.length.toString()},
      {l:'胜率', v:closedTrades.length?(winTrades.length/closedTrades.length*100).toFixed(1)+'%':'-'},
      {l:'最佳单笔', v:bestTrade?(bestTrade.profit>=0?'+':'')+'¥'+bestTrade.profit.toFixed(2):'-', cls:bestTrade&&bestTrade.profit>=0?'up':'dn'},
      {l:'最差单笔', v:worstTrade?(worstTrade.profit>=0?'+':'')+'¥'+worstTrade.profit.toFixed(2):'-', cls:worstTrade&&worstTrade.profit<0?'dn':'up'},
      {l:'总手续费', v:'¥'+totalFees.toFixed(2)},
      {l:'交易天数', v:this.tradingDays.length.toString()},
    ];

    document.getElementById('anMetrics').innerHTML = metrics.map(m =>
      `<div class="an-metric"><div class="ml">${m.l}</div><div class="mv ${m.cls||''}">${m.v}</div></div>`
    ).join('');
  },

  // ── SETTLEMENT ──
  showSettlement() {
    this.settled = true;
    const profit = this.totalProfit();
    const rate = this.profitRate();
    const isUp = profit >= 0;

    document.getElementById('sProfit').textContent = (isUp?'+':'') + '¥' + profit.toFixed(2);
    document.getElementById('sProfit').className = 's-big ' + (isUp?'up':'dn');
    document.getElementById('sRate').textContent = '收益率 ' + (isUp?'+':'') + rate.toFixed(2) + '%';

    const totalFees = this.transactions.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee, 0);
    document.getElementById('sDetails').innerHTML = `
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">初始资金</span><span>¥${this.INIT_CASH.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">现金余额</span><span>¥${this.round(this.cash).toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">持仓市值</span><span>¥${this.totalHoldingsValue().toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">总资产</span><span style="color:var(--acc)">¥${this.totalAsset().toFixed(2)}</span></div>
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">总交易次数</span><span>${this.transactions.length}</span></div>
      <div class="s-row"><span class="sl">总手续费</span><span>¥${totalFees.toFixed(2)}</span></div>
    `;

    document.getElementById('settleOverlay').classList.add('show');
  },

  closeSettle() {
    document.getElementById('settleOverlay').classList.remove('show');
    this.switchTab('analysis');
  },
};

/* ── Toast System ── */
function showToast(msg, type='info') {
  const t = document.createElement('div');
  t.className = 'toast toast-' + type;
  t.textContent = msg;
  document.getElementById('toast-container').appendChild(t);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => t.classList.add('show'));
  setTimeout(() => {
    t.classList.remove('show');
    setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 300);
  }, 2500);
}

/* ── Start ── */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => App.init());
</script>
</body>
</html>
本网站为面向开发者的模型能力演示平台，非正式 AI 助手，内容由 AI 生成仅供参考。
